name: What happens if AEO is misused in discovery?
description: **Sanctions, forced de-designation** - NY courts punish tactical overuse.[1]

mainEntity.name: What happens if AEO is misused in discovery?

acceptedAnswer.text: **Sanctions, forced de-designation** - NY courts punish tactical overuse.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Misuse like overuse leads to sanctions, de-designation, and court warnings on confidentiality abuse.**[1]

NY court sanctioned Google for tactical AEO on non-sensitive docs, despite later fixes.[1] Federal cases limit to competitor risks.[2]

- **Sanctions possible**: Monetary or adverse inferences.[1]
- **De-designation**: Bulk removal ordered.[1]
- **Broader caution**: All confidentiality overuse risky.[1]

Object promptly in meet/confer, motion to compel if needed. Document opponent's delays.
